name: VPN Connection Anomaly Investigation
description: Investigates anomalous VPN connections including impossible travel, unusual geolocation, off-hours access, and concurrent sessions from different locations. Riggs AI correlates the connection against the user's baseline behavior and geolocation data. Confirmed anomalies trigger VPN session termination, MFA re-verification enforcement, and security team notification. Legitimate connections from known travel or new locations are annotated and baselined.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Cisco AnyConnect
required_integrations.reason: Terminate suspicious VPN sessions and query connection logs

required_integrations.name: Okta
required_integrations.reason: Force MFA re-verification and check user authentication history

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify security team of confirmed VPN anomalies

config.description: Triggers when VPN monitoring detects impossible travel, unusual geolocation, off-hours access, or concurrent sessions from different locations

config.additional_instructions: Analyze VPN connection against user baseline: check geolocation plausibility, time-of-day patterns, concurrent session conflicts, and source IP reputation. Determine if this is a compromised account or legitimate travel.
config.description: AI-powered analysis of VPN connection patterns against the user's historical baseline to identify account compromise indicators
Routes based on whether Riggs AI confirmed the VPN connection is anomalous and potentially indicates account compromise

parameters.comment: Session terminated due to VPN anomaly — {{analyze_1.anomaly_type}}, Alert: {{trigger_1.alert.alert_id}}

config.description: Immediately terminates the suspicious VPN session to prevent unauthorized access while investigation continues

parameters.reason: VPN anomaly detected — {{analyze_1.anomaly_type}}. User must re-verify identity before reconnecting.

config.description: Forces MFA re-verification via Okta and clears all active sessions to ensure the user re-authenticates with strong credentials
Notifies the security team of the confirmed VPN anomaly with full context and containment actions taken

parameters.note: VPN connection from {{trigger_1.alert.source_ip}} ({{trigger_1.alert.geo_location}}) analyzed by Riggs AI. Verdict: {{analyze_1.verdict}}. Connection consistent with known travel or updated baseline. No action required.

config.description: Annotates the alert as a legitimate connection and updates the user's location baseline when the anomaly is not confirmed
VPN connection anomaly investigation workflow complete
